_schema.issuer: The platform's LTI issuer (iss claim), e.g. https://your-institution.moodlecloud.com
_schema.clientId: Client ID this platform issued NTLSN when the tool was registered
_schema.authLoginUrl: Platform's OIDC authorization endpoint (from its LTI Advantage tool-registration page)
_schema.jwksUrl: Platform's public JWKS URL, used to verify launch id_tokens
_schema.deploymentIds: Array of deployment_id values the platform issued for this registration
_schema.name: Human-readable label shown on the NTLSN launch confirmation page
